extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won after Sky's hard pace at 10km dropped Gaviria on the climb, eliminating his fastest pure-sprint rival before the uphill finale.
tactical_patterns: Sky's hard tempo 10km out inadvertently cleared Gaviria for Sagan's team, doing Bora's work against their biggest sprint threat.
Jilbert attacked from late breakaway catch but went 500m too early on gradient that eased, allowing Sagan perfect draft positioning.
Van Avermaet chased Jilbert for time bonuses but created slipstream that positioned Sagan fifth wheel entering final left turn.
Bora recon car provided detailed final 2km terrain intel via phone to DS, compensating for Sagan's admitted ignorance of finish.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: dropped on modest 10km climb by Sky's tempo, exposing vulnerability on any uphill finish despite intermediate sprint points
rider_signals.JILBERT Philippe: neutral: attacked from caught breakaway 100m before bonus sprint showing aggression but poor pacing judgment going 500m early on gradient change
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: actively chased time bonuses at intermediate sprint (2 seconds gained) showing GC ambitions beyond stage hunting
rider_signals.SKUJINS Toms: positive: won KOM despite doing chase work to bring back Chavanel, strongest in break but tactically constrained
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: abandoned sick before stage start, eliminating 2017 green jersey winner from competition entirely
